feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit: Accounting data creation with price control V and price determinatio
entry.content:
Hi experts!

 

In Migration Cockpit (Fiori version), I have the next message " Price Control V is not allowed to Price Control Determination 3" while uploading finished goods.

However, if I am going to create the accounting data in MM01, then I have no problem.

On the other hand, if I try to create the finished product with price control S in Migration Cockpit, I get the following error: Only price control “V” for separate valuation is possible.

So, I'm quite stuck with this issue.

Can someone give me a hand?

entry.title: Unable to specify the RFC system in migration cockpit direct transfer
entry.content: When using the Migration Cockpit - Direct Transfer approach, i am unable to specify the source ECC system.  This happens after a client copy is done and in the new client.  Is there anywhere this could be specified or is there a process around this?  Creating a new project everytime, so that it allows us to specify the source system doesn't seems to be an ideal practice.

entry.title: Data Migration with forground Processing
entry.content:
How to perform Data Migration with foreground Processing? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to avoid multiple updates
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

I am trying to extend material master to another plant and storage location using Migration Cockpit, I use Migration Object "Product - extend existing record by new org levels",

I fill in  Basic Data Sheet (Product Number, Run ID), Plant Data Sheet (Product Number, Run ID, Plant), Storage Location Sheet (Product Number, Run ID, Plant, Storage Location).

For Upload to Mapping Tasks steps are suceed, but for Simulate Steps, I got error message like this :

Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to avoid multiple updates

This issue already mentioned in SAP Note 3356771, is this migration object can not be used to upload case like I mentioned above?

entry.title: Are you able to extend multiple vendors and assign the same purchasing organisation by mass change?
entry.content:
Hello

I have a list of vendors I want to extend to use a purchasing organisation XX01

Is this something that can be done on mass I believe I have to

1. Extend the vendor to use Purchase Organisation (our role FLVN01)

2. Associate it to Purchase Organisation XX01, and assign the required static data

If this is something possible are there any blogs to achieve this?

Thanks

entry.title: Internal table names for data of direct transfer inside migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hi,

I'm looking for the internal table names where the data - read from the source system - is stored in S/4 for simulation and migration . Up to now I've only found the table names for the instances (starting with /1LT/PE*), but they only contain the key fields and not the data fields of the source tables, e.g. MARA, MARC, MBEW for object 'Product'.

entry.title: What data needs to be filled in Data controller tab of Customer/Supplier LTMC template?
entry.content: I started migration of Customer master, and I came across data controller tab in the Customer Master LTMC template which was not there in the earlier version. What data should be there in that particular tab?

entry.title: SAP S4HANA migration project and custom code analysis project
entry.content:
Hi SAP

 

What is the different between creating SAP S4HANA migration project and custom code analysis project.

 

I could see the same custom code analysis in both except, selecting the variant while creating custom code analysis project.

 

Regards,


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Automatic assignment of decimals zeros for specific fields in QM - Inspection plan Migration Object
entry.content:
When migrating quality inspection plans from SAP EECC to SAP S/4HANA, the decimal values in the numeric fields of the quantitative inspection characteristics are not preserved. During the migration of the inspection plan, the value 10 is automatically assigned in the decimal field (STELLEN) for each characteristic, and 7 zeros are added to the right of the numeric values (SOLLWERT, TOLERANZUN, TOLERANZOB).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Link sales orders to contracts in bulk for Data Migration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I have query regarding data migration. Actually, during Sales order migration, we are not able to link the sales order contract number in the sales order. There is no field for the contract in the template of the sale order. We have uploaded the Sales order via migration cockpit. In order to, link the Contract number in the Sales Order we have planned to use LSMW but unfortunately it is not working properly. 

It will be very hard to do this activity manually from VA02 since the volume is high. 

So, can we add the sales contract of a sales order in bulk?

Thank you.

entry.title: Copying data of ADMI_** from SAP ECC 6.0 to the SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
I need to copy specific data from the SAP ECC 6.0 tables listed below and paste it into the matching SAP S/4 HANA tables. 

  • ADMI_FILES
  • ADMI_RUN 
  • ADMI_STATS
  • ADMI_VARIA

I attempted to copy the data manually, and it worked. However, could you please advise if there are any tools or Z programs that could be used to accomplish this?

entry.title: Internal Number range skip in vendor master upload using Migration cockpit
entry.content:
Hello Experts, 

We are using Migration cockpit for uploading vendor master in SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Private Edition.  We have vendor number range and BP number range set as Internal.

While uploading, vendor number range is skipped and please refer below screenshot.  In customizing, we have set as no buffering.

Could you please advise on the SAP Standard behavior on the Internal number range skip in vendor master although in customizing it is maintained as No buffering.

Could you please advise on this. 

Thank you,

kind regards

Thangaraj Thomas

entry.title: Hi everyone ,I'm currently trying update some roles for several BP. How proceed with LSMW ?
entry.content:
Hello everyone ! 

I am trying to add some roles to several BP with the help of LSMW 

I recorded the BP transaction (search of the BP, clicked on the bp number, then all of the relevant fields)

However, when running my batch input, lsmw process first looks for the Bp, then it comes back to this screen (image attached) which is throwing me an error... How can i proceed ?  

I know it is best practice to use MASS, but i'd like to have another possibility then that

entry.title: Adding BP roles via Migration Cockpit
entry.content:
Hi everyone, 

I'm currently trying to add some roles for several BP's (so adding massively), that are already in the system. 

Which objects, in the migration cockpit, should I use to proceed with that ?

entry.title: Prepare step: Batch unique at material and client level: S/4HANA Migration Cockpit 2022 FPS02
entry.content:
Hello SAP Team,

I am reaching out to bring to your attention about an weird error which we encountered for standard migration object (Batch at material level).

System details: "Migrate Your Data – Fiori App S4H2022 FPS02." Staging tables approach.

Below steps to reproduce the issue:

1) We created a new project and added standard Migration object "Batch master at material level" from the initial screen of the S/4HANA Migration Cockpit. Later, with the help of this standard we created another copy of migration object by providing a different object description through LTMOM and generated the object.

2) We downloaded the template and filled the data of the standard object and completed all the steps in the Migration cockpit and batches got created successfully. [No issues]

3) In the second iteration, this time we have chosen the copied version of migration object from the same project, filled sample data and attempted to upload. The file was successfully uploaded, data successfully transferred into the staging tables. 

In the next step, "Prepare" we are getting error "Batch level is on Material level" choose the right migration object.

Note: This error we haven't encountered when we used the standard template. This issue is occurring only for the copied migration objects that to specific to this Batch Migration object. 

We have checked the system configuration and it is pointed to material level.

Message no: CNV_DMC_SIN 280

However, I wanted to seek your expertise and insights on how we can address and resolve this error effectively.

Your guidance on the recommended steps, potential causes, or any workarounds would be immensely valuable in ensuring a smooth migration of this data. I appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Thank you for your assistance, and I look forward to your guidance.

Regards,

Vishwa

entry.title: Generate data auto for iDOC testing
entry.content:
Hi Expert:

 

Any tools that I can auto build data into iDOC structure like WP_PLU automatic. Since all data is in SAP table already.

 

Pls advice.

Thanks in advance

ABAP Development ABAP Extensibility SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit

entry.title: The Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)" isn't selecting all assets in the ECC system
entry.content:
Dear SAP experts,

While migrating fixed assets using the Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)" using the Direct Transfer migration method in the Migration Cockpit, we see that not all assets from the table ANLA (in the ECC system) are being selected. Could you explain why this is happening?

Also, we want to migrate the sub assets of these main assets too. If those fixed assets won't be selected, how could we migrate their sub assets?

So, to summarize:

  • Why aren't all fixed assets of the ECC system not being selected by the Migration Object "Fixed asset (including balance)"?
  • How can we migrate the sub assets of these main assets not being selected?

Our SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition release is 2023 FPS 01.

Thanks!
Data migration team


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: LTMOM Field conversion
entry.content:
Hi,

I have created a custom object in the LTMOM. I also use the TPLNR field from the functional location there.
If I use the TPLNR as a key in the XML template, the object also works.
Is there a way to use the conversion routine in the LTMOM with which, for example, the STRNO is converted in the IFLOS table when I insert it into the TPLNR field? I guess i should use CONVERSION_EXIT_TPLNR_INPUT
How do I have to implement this?
Thank you for your support

entry.title: Data Migration Cockpit Error : instance already exists in the table
entry.content:
How can the Data Migration Cockpit be configured or utilized to perform a mass upload of material master data for multiple company codes and valuation types in a single file? Currently, attempting to combine records for multiple company codes and valuation types in one upload file leads to staging table errors indicating duplicate key fields, even when no duplicates exist within the file. Is there a way to simplify this process and avoid the need to create separate files for each combination of company code and valuation type?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Migrate Person via Migrate your Data
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I have been trying for some time now to migrate contact persons using the “Migrate your Data” app.

However, I always get the following message:
Assignment of BP grouping 0001 to vendor account group not available
(CNV_DMC_SIN 555)

However, this is only one contact person, so I shouldn't actually need an account group.

My plan was to migrate the contact persons via the “General data” sheet and then the customers and vendors.

Can anyone help me with this?

Thank you very much.
